# Yashank Gupta - Interactive Web Developer

## Overview
Yashank Gupta is a specialized Web Developer focusing on **React**, **Three.js**, and high-performance interactive web experiences. Based in Uttar Pradesh, India, Yashank bridges creativity and code to build scalable, smooth, and highly optimized frontend interfaces.

## Professional Capabilities
Yashank possesses deep topical authority in crafting 3D-accelerated applications and robust React ecosystems. 

### Core technical stack:
- **Frontend & Mobile**: React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Tailwind CSS, HTML5.
- **3D & Creative Web**: Three.js, WebGL, GSAP (GreenSock), UI/UX Design.
- **Backend & Systems**: Node.js, PHP/Laravel, MySQL/PostgreSQL, REST APIs.
- **DevOps**: Build tools (Vite, Webpack), Git, Version Control, Performance Tuning.

## Selected Portfolio Projects
- **Yuva Foods (Restaurant Website)**: Interactive dining platform with WebGL animations and tailored performance logic for budget devices.
- **Mazda Furai (Interactive Showcase)**: Immersive, award-caliber automotive showcase with dynamic 3D web rendering.
- **Exteroid (Automation Platform)**: Secure Excel Power Automation system featuring anti-bot infrastructure and 3D UI logic.
